Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}You may now venture into Tartarus at your discretion.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 200}You can go there by talking to your allies or by checking the bulletin board in the lounge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Because Tartarus is unavailable until the Dark Hour, time will pass if you decide to make the journey. Give yourself ample time to prepare beforehand.[n]{f 1 1}
